description: Updated Roman sandals have never looked this good. These metallic sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts and skirts. UpperOverlapping straps with a metallic sheen criss-crossing the forefoot and midfoot for added styleSynthetic leather ankle strap for a snug FitSoft feel lining on the ankle strap for added comfortTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and flower heel for better gripThis product may also come without the pattern on the outsoleSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
